summary: Web application with owner access control (only Akgamer4354 can access Owner page), portfolio page, and custom username/password authentication system. Registration is currently broken for all users.
architectural_notes: Custom username/password authentication system (no Internet Identity)
Owner page restricted to Akgamer4354; all other users redirected to portfolio page
known_issues: Registration fails for all users with 'Registration failed. Please try again.' error

existing_features.title: Fix the frontend registration flow in Registration.tsx and the useQueries.ts registration hook so that errors from the backend are correctly caught, surfaced to the user with a meaningful message, and successful registration transitions the user to the login page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Investigate and fix the backend Motoko registration logic so that new users can successfully register with a username and password. Ensure the registerUser function correctly stores credentials, returns a success result, and does not throw or return an error under normal registration conditions.
